caption: A man with a shaved head, beard, and tattoos on his right arm is recording in a studio with dark, ribbed acoustic foam walls. He wears black over-ear headphones and a plain white t-shirt. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone mounted on a boom arm, which features the text "Broadcasting" and "Pro-Audio". Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking into the microphone, with his mouth open in various stages of articulation. He maintains a consistent position, though his facial expressions shift as he talks. By the final frame, he begins to gesture with his right hand, which is partially visible and blurred due to motion. The lighting remains steady, and the composition of the scene stays centered on the man from the chest up.
